news.headline: Stratasys partners with top aerospace firms for new mission-critical 3D printing materials; AIS™ Antero® 800NA and AIS™ Antero 840CN03 for Stratasys F900®.
news.summary: In Eden Prairie, Minnesota, and Rehovot, Israel, Stratasys Ltd. unveiled the release of AIS™ Antero® 800NA and AIS™ Antero 840CN03 as endorsed materials for the Stratasys F900®. This development signifies a significant advancement in certified additive manufacturing for sectors such as aerospace, defense, and highly regulated industries. The rigorous qualification of these new AIS™ materials involved partnerships with prominent entities like Northrop Grumman, Boeing, and Blue Origin. The materials have been specifically designed for these industries and are now officially validated for use with the F900® printer.

news.headline: Assurant introduces Vehicle Care Technology Plus, offering protection for vehicles and mobile devices. #Assurant #technology #vehiclecare
news.summary: Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a top global protection firm focusing on safeguarding and servicing connected devices, homes, and vehicles, has introduced the Assurant Vehicle Care Technology Plus. This new vehicle service contract (VSC) provides consumers with protection for both their vehicles and mobile devices. It offers comprehensive coverage for high-tech components of vehicles. This launch signifies a breakthrough in customer protection for around the world.

news.headline: Deutsche Bank Chairman: German spending plans are truly historic.
CURRENC's SEAMLESS AI Lab introduces "AI Staff for Hire" platform, transforming workforce solutions with AI agents.
news.summary: Transforming the field of workforce solutions, the introduction of AI-powered agents has completely revolutionized the industry. These advanced virtual assistants are designed to optimize efficiency and productivity in the workplace. By leveraging artificial intelligence technology, these agents have significantly improved the way businesses operate, resulting in a remarkable increase in productivity by an average of 40%. The introduction of AI-powered agents has also led to a reduction in operational costs, with companies reporting savings of up to 30% since their implementation. The impact of these technological advancements has been profound, with the workforce solutions sector experiencing unprecedented growth and innovation.

news.headline: CERo Therapeutics to begin Phase 1 trial of CER-1236 in AML after FDA review. Abstract accepted at ASCO 2025. Dosing in H1 2025.
news.summary: A company has announced the acceptance of an abstract at the 2025 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) conference. They are also maintaining their schedule to administer the first dose to a patient in the first half of 2025.

news.headline: Royalty Pharma to host Investor Day in NYC on Sept 11, 2025 at 8:30am ET to discuss driving shareholder value.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) revealed plans for an Investor Day in New York City on September 11, 2025, commencing at 8:30 a.m. ET. During the event, senior executives will discuss strategies to enhance shareholder value by capitalizing on their distinctive business model in the expanding biopharma innovation funding sector. Attendees can engage in live Q&A sessions to address queries.

news.headline: ConstructConnect to renovate Catholic Charities Teen Center in Boston during one-day "blitz build" for AIA25 Conference.
news.summary: A group of volunteers will be participating in a one-day "blitz build" to renovate The Catholic Charities Teen Center at St. Peter's in Boston. This event will take place on March 27, 2025, coinciding with the AIA25 Conference on Architecture & Design. The initiative is organized by ConstructConnect, a prominent provider of construction software solutions. The effort aims to enhance the Teen Center's facilities and services, showcasing community support. It is anticipated that a significant number of volunteers will contribute their time and skills to complete the renovation project within the day, benefiting the local community and aligning with the spirit of the conference.

news.headline: Stephen Siderow of Siderofsky Strategic Advisors joins Allposit, Inc. Advisory Board; focuses on digital solutions.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Siderofsky Strategic Advisors LLC revealed that Stephen Siderow, the Founder and Managing Principal, has been appointed to the Advisory Board of Allposit, Inc. This company offers integrated digital solutions for various industries. The news did not specify the exact number of board members or the specific digital solutions provided by Allposit.

news.headline: LSV honors top industry leaders through their award, aiming to drive transformative change. Winners announced for 2024.
news.summary: The LSV Top Industry Leaders Award recognizes outstanding individuals leading significant change in the industry. The winners of the LSV Top Industry Leaders Award for 2024 have been revealed by Life Sciences Voice (LSV). The prestigious award aims to honor those driving innovation and progress within the industry. This year's recipients were announced in New York on March 27, 2025. The award celebrates individuals who are shaping the future of the industry and making a positive impact.

news.headline: Spiceology's new "Test Kitchen" program lets fans choose future flavors; company is fastest-growing spice with leader status.
news.summary: Spiceology, a rapidly expanding spice company based in SPOKANE, Wash., recently introduced a new initiative that allows spice enthusiasts to have a say in selecting upcoming flavors directly from the company's kitchen. This community-driven program aims to engage customers in the flavor innovation process. This announcement was made on March 27, 2025. Spiceology is known for its innovative approach to spices and has quickly gained popularity, becoming the fastest-growing spice company in the nation. The program signifies a commitment to involving consumers in shaping the future of the brand.

news.headline: Block Advisors by H&R Block partners with The Home Depot to offer exclusive discounts on tax prep & business services for Pro Xtra members.
news.summary: Block Advisors, a division of H&R Block, has joined forces with The Home Depot to provide exclusive deals to Pro Xtra members. This partnership includes special discounts for tax preparation services and year-round business services. Pro Xtra members can take advantage of these offers to save on their financial needs.

news.headline: Gauzy Ltd. to attend Jefferies Virtual Cleantech & Utility Equipment Conference on March 28, 2024 (Nasdaq: GAUZ).
news.summary: Gauzy Ltd., a prominent company in vision and light control technologies listed on Nasdaq as GAUZ, shared that its senior management team will be participating in the Jefferies Virtual Cleantech and Utility Equipment Conference on Friday, March 28, 2024. The event will offer insights into the company's strategies and advancements in this sector.

news.headline: Third Harmonic Bio reports strong 2024 financial results. THB335 Phase 1 data for urticaria indicate progression to Phase 2 trial.
news.summary: Newly released data from the Phase 1 trial of THB335 shows promising results, indicating its potential for further development in a Phase 2 clinical trial focused on chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU). The drug, designed for treating this condition, demonstrated positive outcomes, paving the way for its progression into the next phase of testing. The investment in this development signifies a significant step forward in addressing the challenges posed by CSU, a condition affecting millions worldwide.

news.headline: Hippocratic AI hires seven executives to drive expansion into new sectors and international markets, aiming for global healthcare abundance.
news.summary: Hippocratic AI, based in Palo Alto, California, has recently welcomed seven new executives to their team. These hires are part of the company's efforts to further its mission of providing global healthcare abundance and enhancing patient outcomes.

news.headline: TD SYNNEX reports Q1 results, with 9.5% year-over-year growth in gross billings, CEO Patrick Zammit says.
news.summary: TD SYNNEX (NYSE: SNX) disclosed their fiscal first quarter results ending on February 28, 2025. CEO Patrick Zammit stated that their robust business model enabled them to outpace the market during this period. They experienced a 9.5% year-over-year increase in gross billings in constant currency. This growth was attributed to their end-to-end strategy, global presence, and specialized approach to the market.

news.headline: SONiC PlugFest shows readiness, standardization, TCO savings. 2025 event had 48 companies participating.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, the 2025 SONiC PlugFest recently proved the readiness of Software for Open Networking in the Cloud (SONiC) for enterprise use. This marks a crucial step in standardizing open networking. The event took place at ONE Center, hosted by Aviz Networks, Keysight, and WWT, offering a vendor-neutral environment for 48 companies to validate real-world deployment scenarios and promote the adoption of SONiC in contemporary data centers.

news.headline: TCL CSOT dazzles at AWE 2025 in Shanghai, displaying advanced APEX tech brand and cutting-edge solutions. #displaytech
news.summary: At the 2025 China Appliance and Electronics World Expo (AWE 2025) in Shanghai on March 27, 2025, TCL CSOT, a prominent company in display technology, stood out with its APEX technology brand. The event highlighted a wide array of innovative products, emphasizing the company's commitment to staying at the forefront of the industry.

news.headline: Vasorum's Celt ACD® PLUS Vascular Closure Device gets FDA approval. Charlotte, U.S., on 27th March 2025. #medicaldevice #FDA
news.summary: Vasorum USA, Inc, a privately owned medical device company focused on advancing vascular closure technologies, revealed on March 27, 2025, that they have successfully executed their first commercial cases. This achievement comes after obtaining approval from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for the Celt..., marking a significant milestone for the company. Based in Charlotte, N.C., Vasorum USA, Inc. is committed to revolutionizing vascular closure procedures.

news.headline: Okorio boosts Workday practice with new hires Lawrie Henry as VP and Hifzur Meerapatel as Head. Excited to expand team.
news.summary: In Dallas on March 27, 2025, Okorio, a top Workday partner offering efficient and scalable enterprise solutions, has welcomed Lawrie Henry as the new Vice President of Workday Delivery and Hifzur Meerapatel as the Head of their team. The strategic appointments aim to boost the company's leadership.

news.headline: e123 President to host panel at Medicarians on Medicare market shifts amid Trump policies. LAS VEGAS, March 27, 2025.
news.summary: A forum will be held in Las Vegas on March 27, 2025, to address strategies for adapting to shifts in the market following Medicare policy changes under the Trump administration. e123 will be a prominent sponsor at Medicarians, a leading event for professionals in senior health and wealth sectors. This event will bring together innovators to discuss key insights and trends in the industry amidst these changes.

news.headline: MatchRX launches new wholesale expansion nationwide, helping independent pharmacies save thousands on drugs. Over 2 million transactions completed, millions saved.
news.summary: In Royal Oak, Michigan, on March 27, 2025, it was reported that independent pharmacies nationwide are benefiting from significant savings on prescription drugs. This is due to MatchRX's recent venture into providing Wholesaler drugs. The company has successfully completed over 2 million transactions, resulting in millions of dollars saved for pharmacies. MatchRX's expansion into this new offering is proving to be advantageous for pharmacies across the country.

news.headline: Shiba Inu's burn rate spikes 57,069% as whale burns 1 billion SHIB tokens. SHIB price: $0.00001436, Market Cap: $8.5B. Trader predicts 415% surge to $0.000081.
news.summary: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) prices have dipped recently, but burn rates and whale transactions have seen a significant increase, sparking optimism for the future of this meme coin. Currently trading at $0.00001436, SHIB holds a market cap of $8.5 billion, showing a 6.8% decrease in the past 24 hours but a 12.6% increase over the week. Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is priced at $0.1960 with a market cap of $29.1 billion, experiencing a 4.3% drop in the past day but a 14.3% rise in the week. Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) stands at $0.058542, with a market cap of $3.6 billion, down 6.4% in the last 24 hours and up by 14.8% over the week. After SHIB's recent 15% surge, trader Javon Marks forecasts a potential 415% climb to $0.000081 if the rally persists, indicating a strong momentum for SHIB.

news.headline: Many EU banks lack crypto products despite high investor demand, only 19% offer services; 40% business investors hold cryptos, 18% planning to invest; 30% gap between investor adoption and perceived interest; 19% European financial institutions offer crypto services, 80% recognize crypto's growing importance; 18% banks plan to expand offerings; 27% investors prefer investing through traditional banks, 14% through exchanges; financial institutions risk losing revenue without crypto integration, time to act with MiCA regulation.
news.summary: A survey by Bitpanda reveals that European banks and financial institutions are underestimating the demand for cryptocurrencies, with only 19% offering digital asset products. However, the study shows that over 40% of business investors in Europe already own cryptocurrencies and another 18% plan to invest soon. Despite this, only 19% of financial institutions report strong client demand for crypto products. There is a 30% gap between investor adoption and perceived interest. 18% of institutions plan to expand their crypto services offerings due to growing demand. The main barriers to adoption are internal, such as lack of resources or knowledge. 27% of survey respondents prefer to invest in cryptocurrencies through traditional banks, while only 14% opt for crypto exchanges. Financial institutions without crypto integration risk losing revenue to competition or crypto native companies. 28% of surveyed institutions expect crypto to become more relevant in the next three years. The time to integrate crypto services is now, particularly with regulatory clarity from the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation.

news.headline: Over 400 S. Korean officials reveal $9.8M in crypto assets, averaging $24,000 each. New law mandates disclosure for public officials.
news.summary: South Korea's Ethics Commission disclosed that high-ranking public officials in the country hold an average of 35.1 million won ($24,000) in crypto assets, totaling 14.4 billion won ($9.8 million) among 411 officials out of 2,047. Seoul City Councilor Kim Hye-young reported the highest amount held at 1.76 billion won ($1.2 million). Following calls for transparency, Prime Minister Han Deok-soo mandated public officials to disclose crypto holdings in their assets, leading to a new law passed on May 25, 2023. This law allowed South Koreans access to crypto data of 5,800 officials starting from 2024. The legislation stemmed from a scandal involving lawmaker Kim Nam-kuk liquidating crypto assets before the FATF's "Travel Rule." Despite being acquitted due to lack of public disclosure requirements at the time, this event prompted the establishment of a system for recording crypto holdings in the country.

news.headline: KB Home debuts first wildfire-resilient neighborhood, meeting IBHS standards, aims to protect homes from natural disasters.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, KB Home, a leading homebuilder in the U.S., has introduced the country's initial new-home development compliant with wildfire resilience standards set by the Insurance Institute for Business & Home Safety. This independent nonprofit organization focuses on safeguarding homes and communities from natural calamities. The new community utilizes fire-resistant construction materials and techniques. KB Home (NYSE: KBH), known for being one of the biggest and most reputable homebuilders in the nation, announced this milestone.

news.headline: CDI Labs introduces Technology Access Program for Serum Antibodies with PhIP-Seq libraries; Enhances high-throughput seromic analysis. Expands researcher access to Phage Display Immunoprecipitation Sequencing services.
news.summary: CDI Labs Canada Inc. has recently introduced a new custom service to enhance access for researchers to their Phage Display Immunoprecipitation Sequencing (PhIP-Seq) services, facilitating high-throughput seromic analysis. This expansion in services aims to increase access and efficiency in proteome-wide antibody research. The development was announced in Toronto on March 27, 2025. This move marks a significant step in promoting advancements in seromic analysis, offering researchers additional resources for their studies.

news.headline: Chiikawa Pocket app by Applibot, Inc. based on Chiikawa manga by Nagano launches with 2 million pre-registrations.
news.summary: In Tokyo on March 27, 2025, tech company Applibot, Inc. released Chiikawa Pocket, their debut mobile app inspired by illustrator Nagano's famous manga, Chiikawa. The app went live today and has garnered an impressive 2 million pre-registrations from a total of 43 countries and regions worldwide.

news.headline: CoinList partners with IFI for compliance training, enhancing U.S. operations; IFI selected to deliver customized program.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, the Institute for Financial Integrity (IFI) disclosed that CoinList, a prominent token launch platform, has chosen IFI to provide a tailored training initiative. This program aims to bolster the compliance knowledge of CoinList's U.S. operations. This collaboration showcases IFI's commitment to enhancing regulatory practices in the financial sector.

news.headline: Academy Sports + Outdoors surpasses 300 stores, plans to open 20-25 new stores in fiscal 2025, including 5 in Q1.
news.summary: A leading retailer, Academy Sports + Outdoors, has announced its plan to launch a significant number of new stores in fiscal 2025. The company aims to open a total of 20-25 stores throughout the year, including the opening of five stores in the first quarter alone. Located in Q1 KATY, Texas, the expansion efforts signify a strategic move by Academy to enhance its presence in the sporting goods and outdoor recreation market. The company, listed as Nasdaq: ASO, is enthusiastic about this planned expansion and the opportunities it will bring.

news.headline: NeOnc partners with CBCC Global Research to advance brain cancer treatments in India. Accelerating trials globally. #NTHI #clinicalresearch #oncology.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, NeOnc Technologies Holdings, Inc. revealed a partnership with CBCC Global Research, a well-known full-service clinical research organization. This collaboration, significant for NeOnc, a clinical-stage medical biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq Global Market as NTHI, aims to enhance its clinical trial operations in India. The move is crucial for the development of its neuro-oncology treatment.

news.headline: Jeffs’ Brands reports completion of development for Fort's AI pest control app. #technology #pestcontrol
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the city of New York has recorded an increase in daily cases of COVID-19, with over 2,000 new infections reported in the last 24 hours. This surge brings the total number of confirmed cases in the city to over 500,000 since the beginning of the pandemic. Additionally, the report highlights a concerning rise in hospitalizations, with a current total of 1,500 COVID-19 patients receiving treatment. Health officials have attributed this spike to the spread of the highly contagious Delta variant and have urged residents to adhere to safety protocols such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to curb further transmission of the virus. The city is closely monitoring the situation and working to increase vaccination efforts to combat the ongoing surge in cases.

news.headline: CEO's 2025 annual letter highlights Wellgistics Health's success, with a revenue increase of 15% and a net profit of $10 million.
Organovo (Nasdaq: ONVO) gives business update on its focus in developing treatments for inflammatory bowel disease.
news.summary: In San Diego on March 27, 2025, Organovo Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ONVO) shared a business update. The company, a clinical stage biotech firm, specializing in innovative treatments for inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), detailed their recent developments.

news.headline: Spirit Blockchain Capital is launching Exchange Traded Products (ETPs) on SIX and Deutsche Börse, advancing digital asset investing.
news.summary: Swiss-based Spirit Digital AG, a subsidiary of Spirit Blockchain Capital Inc. (CSE: SPIR / OTC: SPBCF / FRA: RTFB), is set to introduce its initial lineup of Exchange Traded Products (ETPs) as part of its commitment to pioneering digital asset finance solutions. The announcement was made on March 27, 2025, signaling Spirit's dedication to driving innovation in the sector.

news.headline: AIM ImmunoTech released Q4 and full year 2024 financial results, focusing on Ampligen in pancreatic cancer research.
news.summary: Ongoing progress in advancing clinical trials for Ampligen® (rintatolimod) in areas with urgent medical needs, particularly focusing on pancreatic cancer treatment, a valuable sector in the healthcare industry.

news.headline: SCF Partners invests in Phoenix Service Partners for rapid growth, founded by industry veterans in 2024.
news.summary: A recent investment has been made by SCF Partners in Phoenix Service Partners, a company focused on high-horsepower, low-emission natural gas compression. Phoenix was established in 2024 by industry experts Randy Dean as CEO and Rick Childress as COO, both having significant experience in leading successful contract compression companies. SCF's contribution marks a significant milestone in the growth of Phoenix as they aim to expand their services in the industry.

news.headline: Duchesnay Pharmaceutical Group wins 2025 Healthiest Workplace Award, after receiving the 2024 Life Sciences Innovation Award.
news.summary: In Blainville, Quebec, on March 27, 2025, Duchesnay Pharmaceutical Group (DPG) was honored with the 2024 Life Sciences Innovation Award from ADRIQ. Now, the company is excited to share that they have also clinched the 2025 Healthiest Workplace Award by Dialogue Health Technologies Inc. This accolade recognizes DPG's commitment to employee well-being, promoting a healthy workplace environment. This achievement highlights the company's dedication to fostering a positive and conducive work atmosphere.

news.headline: Make-A-Wish launches "WishMakers Wanted" campaign - aims to grant 89 wishes daily, worldwide during World Wish Month.
news.summary: A global campaign is uniting communities around the world to fulfill wishes as Make-A-Wish marks its 45th anniversary of making dreams come true. On a daily basis, an average of 89 wishes are granted by Make-A-Wish thanks to the efforts of WishMakers. WishMakers play a crucial role in bringing joy to those in need and making a positive impact in the lives of individuals. The organization's mission continues to thrive through the collective support of individuals worldwide.

news.headline: Adaptiva's new product auto-remediates vulnerabilities found by SentinelOne platform, enhancing endpoint security.
news.summary: A cutting-edge product has been launched by Adaptiva, a top player in autonomous endpoint management. This new product is designed to automatically fix vulnerabilities identified by SentinelOne Singularity™ Platform. It aims to swiftly address endpoint risks on a large scale. The announcement was made in Kirkland, Wash., on March 27, 2025.

news.headline: Diversified unveils Atlas Orchestrate platform for quick cloud deployment, setting up environments in minutes instead of days.
news.summary: Diversified, a prominent global technology solutions provider based in Plano, Texas, has introduced Atlas™ Orchestrate. This innovative platform revolutionizes cloud deployment by allowing organizations to establish cloud environments and software packages swiftly, within mere minutes rather than prolonged periods of days or weeks. Atlas functions as a secure infrastructure that underpins Diversified's advanced technology solutions, ensuring a secure base for upcoming innovations and serving as the cornerstone for further developments.

news.headline: OWASP promotes GenAI Security Project to flagship status for LLM & Generative AI, recognizing industry need.
news.summary: Today, the Open Worldwide Application Security Project (OWASP) declared that its OWASP Top 10 for Machine Learning Models (LLM) and Generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) has been acknowledged by the industry as essential, leading to an expansion in scope. This project has now become an OWASP Flagship Project. The announcement was made in Wilmington, Delaware on March 27, 2025. This framework serves to highlight the top 10 critical security risks for LLM and Generative AI.

news.headline: Monthly housing payments for U.S. homebuyers hit all-time high of $2,807, up 5.3% from a year ago, due to rising sale prices and a 6.67% average weekly mortgage rate.
news.summary: In Seattle, the average monthly housing payment for U.S. homebuyers reached a record high of $2,807 in the four weeks ending March 23, showing a 5.3% increase compared to the previous year. This data comes from a report by Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN), a technology-driven real estate brokerage. The surge in housing costs is attributed to two main factors: a 3% year-over-year increase in median home-sale prices and an average weekly mortgage rate of 6.67%, which is more than double that of the pre-pandemic period.

news.headline: DNSFilter helps Swiss MSP enhance security for education sector. Anykey, leading Apple-focused MSP, sees content filtering as key to security.
news.summary: A prominent Managed Services Provider (MSP) in Switzerland, anykey, known for its focus on Apple products and catering to the education sector, recently enhanced its security offering by incorporating content filtering. The company, a long-time user of DNSFilter's services, considers content filtering to be a crucial aspect of its security solutions. The announcement was made on March 27, 2025, emphasizing the importance of foundational security measures. The partnership between anykey and DNSFilter showcases the increasing significance of content filtering in modern cybersecurity practices.

news.headline: Bright Power has reduced 667M lbs of CO2, equivalent to taking 71,000 cars off the road in 20 years.
news.summary: Since its establishment two decades ago, Bright Power has successfully reduced 667 million pounds of CO2 emissions, a figure comparable to taking 71,000 cars off the road. The company's primary goal has been to advance the shift towards a zero-carbon future by offering energy and carbon-saving solutions. The noteworthy impact of their efforts reflects a significant step in environmental conservation and sustainability.

news.headline: Soluna and Luxor report success with BitMine through turnkey mining model, aiming for growth. $SLNH, #SLNH, OTCQX: BMNR
news.summary: Albany-based Soluna Holdings, Inc., a company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol SLNH, unveiled a case study showcasing the fruitful collaboration with Luxor Technology Corporation and BitMine Immersion Technologies, listed on OTCQX as BMNR. Titled “Scaling Hashrate, Simplified: The Turnkey Mining Model That Delivered for BitMine,” the study highlights the success of their strategic partnership. Soluna specializes in eco-friendly data centers for high-demand computing tasks like Bitcoin mining and AI applications.

news.headline: Priority announces launch of Ambient for ICHRA plan admin and payments. Aimed at streamlining health benefits for employers.
news.summary: Priority Technology Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PRTH) based in Alpharetta, Georgia, introduced its Ambient business division specialized in Individual Coverage Health Reimbursement Arrangement (ICHRA) plan payments and administration. ICHRAs, considered employer-funded health benefits, enable tax-free reimbursements for individual health insurance to employees. This launch extends the company's payment and banking solutions that facilitate the seamless collection, storage, lending, and transfer of funds to maximize revenue opportunities.

news.headline: Simbian to host industry's first AI SOC Championship on April 8, with $10,000 in cash prizes available.
news.summary: Simbian®, a company based in Mountain View, California, is focusing on revolutionizing business security through AI technology. They have revealed plans to organize the inaugural AI SOC Championship event on April 8. This unique competition aims to assess participants' abilities in threat detection and response, offering a generous sum of $10,000 as prize money. To participate or learn more about the event, individuals can visit https://resources.simbian.ai/ai-soc-championship-2025. The championship is designed to replicate the functions of a futuristic Security Operations Center (SOC).

news.headline: SugarCRM named a Leader in Nucleus Research Sales Force Automation Technology Value Matrix 2025, 5th consecutive year.
news.summary: In San Francisco, SugarCRM, renowned for its intelligence-driven sales automation platform, has been labeled a Leader in the Nucleus Research Sales Force Automation Technology Value Matrix for 2025. Achieving this recognition for the fifth year in a row, Sugar has consistently stood out in Nucleus Research’s technology value matrix evaluations. Noteworthy acknowledgments include being named a Leader in the 2024 standalone SFA report, as well as in the 2023, 2022, and 2021 CRM Technology Value Matrix reports.

news.headline: ExaGrid nominated for 15 categories in Storage Awards 2025, including Storage Innovator & Immutable Storage Company.
news.summary: MARLBOROUGH--ExaGrid®, known for its Tiered Backup Storage solution with Retention Time-Lock and unique non-network-facing tiered air gap with delayed deletes and immutability for ransomware recovery, has received 15 nominations at the 22nd annual Storage Awards. The company is a finalist in various categories, including Storage Innovator of the Year, Immutable Storage Company of the Year, and Storage Industry Champion – Commercial Storage. This recognition highlights ExaGrid's position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Audax Strategic Capital invests in Fortis, enables Lovell Minnick Partners to make new investment, ASC provides mid-hold equity.
news.summary: Audax Strategic Capital, a provider of tailored mid-hold equity solutions, has recently made an investment in Fortis, a leading payments technology company catering to software providers, ERP clients, and growing businesses. This investment, facilitated through a cross-fund transaction, allowed existing Fortis investor Lovell Minnick Partners to make a new strategic investment in the company. The specifics of the ASC transaction were not disclosed.
